title: Board View Permissions
excerpt:
HI,

posts.author: SachaD (Sacha Dodig)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI,

I have a Board with sensitive information but I need someone to be able to view only few items in that Board, is it possible to create a view and give permission to one user only and he can’t change anything in that view so he will not be able to see other items in that board but only what I set the filter for?

I know there are option to go around this but I do not want to create other boards just so someone can view few rows.

posts.author: alines (aline)
posts.cookedHtml: I believe that this is super important as companies which use Monday are not only using it as a task tracking platform also on sharing processes and checklists… we currently need this feature ASAP
